A test to verify that converting the string "123456" to a number results in 123456.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the conversion of a string to a number in JavaScript. It uses the `Number` function to convert the string `"123456"` into the numeric value `123456`. The `assert` function verifies that the conversion result is equal to the expected numeric value. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on validating the behavior of the `Number` function for a specific input. It is likely part of a larger test suite to ensure correct type conversion in JavaScript.
